summary: V64.1 Oracle Search UI & BackToHub Route Purge - All tests pass. Oracle Search component renders inline on SovereignHub with domain-grouped results, bridge indicators, and correct /workshop/{moduleId} routes. BackToHub Related dropdown uses new /workshop/ paths. Legacy redirects work correctly.
test_credentials: Guest mode - no auth required for workshop/search endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: V64.1 Oracle Search & BackToHub verified: (1) Oracle Search UI renders inline on SovereignHub at /sovereign-hub with data-testid='oracle-search', (2) Search input accepts text and queries /api/workshop/search endpoint with 250ms debounce, (3) Search 'foundation' returns results grouped by 4 domains (Trade & Craft, Healing Arts, Sacred Knowledge, Exploration) with domain bridge bar showing counts, (4) '4 domains bridged' indicator appears when multiple domains hit, (5) Search 'pressure' returns Trade & Craft and Healing Arts results, (6) Search 'safety' returns Healing Arts and Trade & Craft bridged results, (7) Empty state shows for non-existent searches like 'xyznonexistent', (8) Clear button (X) clears search and results, (9) Clicking search result navigates to correct /workshop/{moduleId} route, (10) BackToHub Related dropdown on /workshop/masonry shows '/workshop/carpentry' not '/carpentry-workbench', (11) BackToHub Related dropdown on /workshop/electrical shows '/workshop/plumbing' and '/workshop/hvac', (12) Legacy redirect /masonry-workbench → /workshop/masonry works correctly, (13) All search results use NO modals - everything is inline as specified, (14) Backend /api/workshop/search returns results with id, title, domain, icon, accentColor, route, score, matchedTags fields, (15) Backend /api/workshop/registry returns 22+ modules across 6 domains.

features_verified.oracle_search_renders: PASS - OracleSearch component renders on SovereignHub
features_verified.oracle_search_input: PASS - Search input accepts text with data-testid='oracle-search-input'
features_verified.search_foundation_multi_domain: PASS - Returns Trade & Craft, Healing Arts, Sacred Knowledge, Exploration
features_verified.search_pressure_domains: PASS - Returns Trade & Craft and Healing Arts results
features_verified.search_safety_bridging: PASS - Returns Healing Arts and Trade & Craft bridged
features_verified.domain_bridge_bar: PASS - Shows domain indicators with counts and glow
features_verified.domains_bridged_indicator: PASS - Shows '4 domains bridged' when multiple domains hit
features_verified.clear_button: PASS - X button clears search and results
features_verified.backtohub_electrical_related: PASS - Shows Plumbing at /workshop/plumbing, HVAC at /workshop/hvac
features_verified.no_modals: PASS - All expansion is inline, no fixed positioning or z-index overlays
features_verified.backend_workshop_endpoints: PASS - All workshop material/tool endpoints work
